meta.title: Diaspora Money Transfers — FinPay Africa
meta.description: Fast, low-cost money transfers for African diaspora communities. Transparent FX, local payout options, and built-in compliance.

hero.headline: Send money home with speed, trust, and clarity
hero.sub: Low-fee transfers from Europe, North America and the Middle East into Africa, with local payout rails, market-leading FX, and full compliance.

features1.headline: Deliver faster, safer remittances for every corridor

items.title: Global corridor coverage
items.body: Support payouts from major diaspora hubs into local African accounts, mobile wallets, and cash pickup partners.

items.title: Fast settlement
items.body: Most transfers settle in under 60 seconds with transparent routing and real-time notification updates.

items.title: Built-in compliance
items.body: AML screening, KYC checks, and sanctions filtering keep every transfer safe and auditable.

items.title: Transparent FX pricing
items.body: Show customers exact exchange rates and fees before they send, with no hidden costs.

items.title: Developer-friendly APIs
items.body: Integrate remittance flows quickly with REST endpoints, webhooks, and customizable payout journeys.

items.title: Secure onboardings
items.body: Protect your brand with multi-layer fraud controls and secure settlement rails.

items.label: EUR, USD, GBP, AED, and more

features2.headline: Connect families, businesses, and financial ecosystems

items.title: Regulated payout partners
items.body: Work with licensed local payers and banks across Africa for fast, compliant delivery.

items.title: Multi-rail support
items.body: Offer bank transfers, mobile wallet credit, and cash collection in key markets.

items.title: Consumer-friendly experience
items.body: Keep the customer journey simple with clear fees, rate locking, and instant status updates.

items.title: Data-driven insights
items.body: Measure corridor performance, customer retention, and FX margins from one dashboard.

items.title: White-label flows
items.body: Brand the remittance experience as your own while FinPay handles the rails.

items.title: Secure funding
items.body: Protect customer deposits with strong settlement controls and secure wallets.

cta.headline: Launch diaspora transfers with confidence
cta.sub: Enable low-cost, fast, compliant remittances for African diaspora customers.
cta.trust: Trusted by diaspora fintechs · No setup fee · Full API control
